title: double-Option field handling in presence_status_set is opaque
description: misc.rs lines 105-125: the three nullable fields (status_text, status_emoji, expires_at) are &input.field references to Option<Option<T>>, then inner-mapped via .map(serde_json::Value::from).unwrap_or(Null). The indirection through the outer reference is non-obvious. receipt_sharing (line 126) uses a different pattern (direct if-let on a copy of Option<bool>) with no comment explaining why it differs. Fix: add a one-line comment at each block explaining the Some(None)-null vs Some(Some(v))-value semantics.
close_reason: decision: Option<Option<T>> is correct JMAP nullable-patch idiom; documented in PresenceStatusSetInput doc comment; no change needed
